Notice Of Motion To Amend The Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Continued To Oct-13-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK Motion to Amend the Complaint. Appearances: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 321-9025 specially appearing for Plaintiff. Counsel gave notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. Ruling: The Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues the matter to October 13, 2009. Plaintiff's counsel will give notice to Defendant of new hearing date. Plaintiff to provide Proof of Service and courtesy copies of moving papers to the court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Off Calendar Oct-15-2007 Continued To Nov-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Sanctions, And Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted
Off Calendar Sep-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Capital One Bank's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is ordered off calendar as it was not timely filed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on August 24, 2007. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Set For Trial On Oct-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
